caption: A screen recording captures a video call featuring a man in a black baseball cap and a light-colored shirt appearing in a small window on the right. The main portion of the screen displays a digital mind map or network diagram on a black background. This diagram contains various circular nodes connected by blue lines, some containing small profile images. A prominent rectangular node in the center features a collage of images with the word "SHARE" written in large, white, uppercase letters. At the top of the screen, multiple browser tabs are open, showing titles such as "Trust & Learning by Systemdyn," "Future of Society by Systemdyn," and "Insights Introduction Kumu." Across the sequence of frames, the screen remains static with no significant movement or changes in the visual layout, while the man in the video window continues to look toward the camera.
